title: EPIC — Position-Independent Caching
summary_zh: 以 compile-link 類比形式化 Position-Independent Caching：chunk 被「編譯」（獨立 KV cache）再「連結」（邊界選擇性重計算）。8× TTFT、7× 吞吐量。對文件排序在不同調用間變化的 agent 特別有價值。
summary_en: Formalizes Position-Independent Caching using a compile-link analogy: chunks are "compiled" (independent KV cache) then "linked" (selective boundary recomputation). 8x TTFT, 7x throughput. Particularly valuable for agents where document ordering varies across invocations.
